title: othocallis libanotica
intro: Othocallis libanotica, also known as Syrian jasmine or jasmine of Lebanon, is a flowering plant native to the Middle East. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Othocallis libanotica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of depression. The herbal preparations of Othocallis libanotica can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
